rows.label: qev087005_MSG0001
rows.name:
Is that the Growth data drive?
Excellent work. You have my thanks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087005_MSG0002
rows.name:
Tatsu happy to get thanks, but
MORE happy to get reward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087005_MSG0003
rows.name:
Of course. I'll reward you for your
efforts with as large a sum as I'm able.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087005_MSG0004
rows.name:
Next comes the task of decrypting
and analyzing this data.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087005_MSG0006
rows.name:
I'm afraid not. However, I might
suggest letting a Ma-non take a look.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087005_MSG0007
rows.name:
If you'd like, we can bring
it to someone we know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087005_MSG0008
rows.name: I see. I leave it to you, then.[ST:wait ]
